testcase.name: api > CORS > includes CORS headers for allowed origins
api > CORS > excludes CORS headers for disallowed origins
api > CORS > handles preflight requests for allowed origins
api > security headers > includes protective security headers
api > GET /health > returns status ok
api > GET /items > returns items from D1
api > GET /items > returns 500 when the database is unavailable
api > POST /items > returns 413 when the body exceeds the size limit
api > POST /items > returns 415 when Content-Type is not application/json
api > POST /items > returns 400 for malformed JSON
api > POST /items > returns 400 when the body is not an object
api > POST /items > returns 400 when the body is null
api > POST /items > returns 400 when name is missing
api > POST /items > returns 400 when name is not a string
api > POST /items > returns 400 when name is empty
api > POST /items > returns 400 when name is only whitespace
api > POST /items > returns 400 when name exceeds the maximum length
api > POST /items > creates an item with valid input
api > POST /items > trims whitespace from the name
api > POST /items > returns 500 when the database insert fails
api > unknown routes > returns 404 for unrecognized paths
